        • [ - ] Leokh - member since 20-Sep-13

          Pep 4-1-4-1 tactics failed just like the previous one and also deployed the wrong people and Bernardo Silva should never be a captain, how can a soft spoken guy be a captain? I think the captain should be either Ruben Dias or Haaland. Anyway, City will never win a big trophy this year with this kind of tactics and players involved. They need a big revamp especially on the defence side and basically Pep is too long in this role, he needs to find a new club and City needs a new manager.

          24 weeks ago

        • [ - ] Caseyyy1 - member since 28-Nov-17
